scripts.setup:run: cd data-provisioning-tool && npx rimraf node_modules package-lock.json && npm install && cd ../db-testing-framework && npx rimraf node_modules package-lock.json && npm install && npx playwright install && cd ..
scripts.test:full: cd data-provisioning-tool && npx ts-node --esm --loader ts-node/esm src/init-db.ts && npx ts-node --esm --loader ts-node/esm src/seeder.ts && npx ts-node --esm --loader ts-node/esm src/check-conn.ts && cd ../db-testing-framework && npx playwright test
